Footage captures the moment a Ukrainian drone blasted a Russian oil depot into the sky, sending a huge fireball billowing into the air as debris rained down around it. Ukraine launched its largest drone attack on Moscow in years on Thursday, sparking fires in and around the Russian capital and forcing evacuations at the country's largest airport, officials said. Unverified videos on social media purported to show large columns of black smoke over the city's skyline, while another showed drones buzzing overhead.

The conversation was between the two women who knew Simon Cowell best: his mum Julie, and his partner Lauren, the mother of his child. Julie would pass away soon afterwards, aged 89, but it's only recently - over ten years on - that Lauren has reflected on her wisdom. Basically, she was telling the younger woman how to be Mrs Simon Cowell. 'Eric was a baby and we were talking about Simon and his kind of quirkiness and the things he does. His mum, who was an amazing woman, said to me, "You know, darling, you have to find your own thing. You've got to be your own person with Simon. In order to deal with Simon, you've got to have your own things too."
  • 2 comments

The Major Oak, located in Sherwood Forest in Nottinghamshire, is thought to have died after its first spring with no leaves, according to wildlife charity RSPB. Legend has it the hollowed-out trunk of the huge oak - said to be approximately 1,200 years old - was used as a hideout by outlaw Robin Hood. In actuality, the large cavity was caused by fungi.

My friend has quoted for me several times for my travel back and forth to Asia, she has never managed to get a better deal than I can get direct from hotels or airlines, but I’ve booked hotels through her out of pity really. She talks about “the business” like she’s an international business woman when in reality she is exactly the same as the lady in this article. I value our friendship so I can’t say anything to her or I’ll be labelled unsupportive and all sorts of other things she’s been trained to respond to the doubters. She’s lost many friends and people really distanced themselves from her at social events now. It’s really sad.

NEW Zendaya turned heads in a sheer minidress as she and her husband Tom Holland attended a Spider-Man fan event in Amsterdam on Wednesday night.  The couple are busy promoting the latest Marvel instalment and just hours earlier they made their debut red carpet appearance since officially confirming they are married. brilliant - a car that hasn't been strangled at birth by red tape and weighed down by mountains of surplus electronics, now can you knock a zero off the list price please?

The stripped-back car weighs a meagre 900kg and its naturally-aspirated 7.0-litre V8 engine that sends 700bhp exclusively to the rear wheels. That means 780bhp per tonne - more than a Bugatti Chiron. But modern driver assistance features like power steering and traction control are optional features for this incredibly raw road car.
